h9d7db5e4g4d54g4f1fg8110g8f6d55d66b3b: Go on - more of us inside.
h8d57572cgeee4g43e1g89c9g20d5caafd736: 'Allo and welcome to Bogrot! Now, kindly - giz all your stuff.
hc2ead998g8c58g474dgbafeg6ac60e204a3c: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
h39f953d6ga730g40f5g8c1fgb645f2f440c8: Local soil-scratchers probably called it something else, but they's dead a hundred years.
h5545ecdag30cdg48b5g836eg3409b595affb: So now it's Bogrot. And you got to give over your goods.
h696943adgb112g4de0gadefg0450d9492031: Hah! Nah. But it'll save us scrubbing the goo off your goods when we kill ya, see?
h057919f6g3e4bg4b58gb95ag473b4fadbcb6: How about a donation instead? Some coin for the town. ([463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca])
h33204dfcg78c6g4664g8932g354d149293cc: ... aye. Aye, I reckon that'll do nicely. The good folk of Bogrot give ya thanks.
h82493d17ga935g4681ga678g8a1137e4ba02: It's a fine day, my friend. Why spoil it with killing?
h21b66245g1ea6g4ae5gb255gafeb519a7310: Well ain't you got a sunny disposition? The bugbear'll hate ya.
h0ad9b32bg225cg4703g9800g4ef7010a1a81: Go wake him up - and tell 'im I sent ya.
hfe02d5efg6e6bg4777g905cgf8175ec7c76c: Killing you would make my day, but I don't fancy cleaning up your guts afterwards. Hand over your stuff - now.
h77590b3fg9993g43c0g8334g27650bcd39db: Nice town. I'll wipe my feet on your corpse before entering.
h878f0f74gcbb3g407egb65ag810794cce0e4: Temper on you, eh? Fine - keep yer goods. Our crowd own this town - we can take you any time we want.
he4fb320fg25c3g48fag9e85g9f7312a587db: Hah! You got guts. Now show me what colour they are.
he3a7ea3cg096fg4973g9452g635714b95bb1: Then my search is over - I'm actually here to write the Ballad of Bogrot.
h6572ba98g40d2g4ec0gb182g9e4a423a0b02: You what? Go on then, we're bored - give us a taste.
hd54d457bg2f48g446ag86c4g526fe44e40df: 'Bogrot, fair Bogrot - with hills as green as goblin snot.'
h14e7b7dbgd099g489egb1dfg0d2dc30341b3: Bit flowersome, but you got something there. Go on in - reckon you can polish it up some once you've seen the place.
h55e9fe04g3909g43f3g968cg41217511e390: Blegh. Reckon you'll make sweeter sounds once we slice you a bit.
ha8e1f0fbgcfafg4c89gb8c7gd7fd96a62559: 'Built on BONES of goblin FOE, Bogrot bears a FEAST for CROWS!'
h07b5f2d6g6a40g4338gb4c3g2120a4c8fe62: Aye, now that's a beat! Needs drumming, though - got some skulls inside you could use. Go on.
h0d6de010gb4b9g4bc9ga734g1573b0e03337: It's not ready - I need to see the town first.
h6d2a3e79gdea2g4501gacb1g74f28fe738ed: Compromise, then. We'll pop your eyes out and give them the tour, eh?
hcaf19186g498cg47fbg9980g2db1d9ab7174: I'll give you another chance. Look at me again, and choose your words carefully.
heb10b11fg42b6g4c69g8e9eg8543f35240d0: I'm lookin' - just ain't seeing much. Might be we need to carve you open?
hf6b60a8eg84c3g44b9gae4dg7ffa348e61c6: Ah. Right. Might be I was a little rude. All drow're welcome in Bogrot.
h758a4ee4g5fa4g4c97g9eacgb070eaf612fa: I'll give you another chance. Look at me again, and choose your words carefully.
h6611ce9ag41efg405cg8a1fgb44c241a4635: The only thing you're getting is a beating.
h4ba920acg4c7bg4911g9a37g47012d15aa4f: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
h36805ecfgd936g4106g863dgb06336effad9: ... a True Soul. Right. Ah - welcome to Bogrot!
h37f40c90geb47g468cgbcabga61101fbe5ef: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
hc29699feg9f5dg47cag8022g5d79ba2d1c7e: Or whatever you want to call it - s'your town now. Heh.
h3946fd43gd774g490fga0dag29e6e47fe7c6: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
hab42590fg2343g4895ga1ccgaf4369427781: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
hacb67a88g6531g41c7gbf04g8a4222076c39: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
hcdf8cd64g2d51g49a5ga76ag6c64144e7e6b: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
hb827f492g5ac2g40c3gbc79g2e3063fd419f: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
h5804b90bg5592g4a31gac9fgf825ff411a15: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
hd34f0bc0g4296g4d1egabb9gfb6b4efffb40: You do not give orders to me.
h0701cba0g1a89g4fe6ga745g4cefc7031c36: This ain't your town, friend. But it can be your grave.
h73d60938gc581g49d2gbf7eg114e4a3f4857: *As the symbol glows, power courses through you. Authority.*
